description: Add Unit Test Suite - establish vitest and cover all pure functions (OAuth crypto, path validation, env resolution, filter transformation) without requiring a live API key

userStories.title: Set up vitest and test script
userStories.description: As a developer, I want npm test to run a test suite so I can validate changes locally.
acceptanceCriteria: vitest added as a devDependency in package.json
"test": "vitest run" script added to package.json scripts
npm test runs and exits with code 0 (or non-zero only when tests fail, not due to config errors)
Typecheck passes (npm run build)
userStories.notes: vitest@4.0.18 installed as devDependency; 'test': 'vitest run' added to scripts; npm test exits 0; npm run build passes.

userStories.title: Test path parameter validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests confirming that validatePathParam blocks path traversal and allows valid IDs.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/client.test.ts
Test: valid alphanumeric ID returns the same string
Test: ID with hyphens, underscores, dots, and @ passes through
Test: ID containing ../ throws an error
Test: ID containing a space throws an error
Test: ID containing / throws an error
Tests pass (npm test)
userStories.notes: tests/client.test.ts created with 5 validatePathParam tests; all pass.

userStories.title: Test resolveAuthFromEnv
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests confirming that resolveAuthFromEnv reads environment variables correctly and throws when required vars are missing.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests in tests/client.test.ts (same file as US-002)
Test: returns correct apiKey and the default baseUrl when only RESPAN_API_KEY is set
Test: returns custom baseUrl when both RESPAN_API_KEY and RESPAN_API_BASE_URL are set
Test: throws an error when RESPAN_API_KEY is not set
Use vitest's vi.stubEnv to set/unset env vars safely between tests
Tests pass (npm test)
userStories.notes: 3 resolveAuthFromEnv tests added to tests/client.test.ts using vi.stubEnv; all pass.

userStories.title: Test OAuth encrypt/decrypt roundtrip
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests proving that encrypt then decrypt roundtrips correctly and that tampered or expired tokens are rejected.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/oauth.test.ts
OAUTH_SECRET env var set in test setup (e.g. beforeAll using vi.stubEnv)
Test: encrypt then decrypt returns the original payload
Test: token with fewer than 28 bytes throws 'Invalid token'
Test: createAuthCode then verifyAuthCode roundtrip preserves jwt, codeChallenge, redirectUri, clientId
Test: verifyAuthCode with an already-expired code (exp in the past) throws 'Auth code expired'
Test: createClientRegistration then verifyClientRegistration roundtrip preserves clientId and redirectUris
Test: verifyAuthCode called with a client registration token throws (wrong type check)
Tests pass (npm test)
userStories.notes: tests/oauth.test.ts created with 6 tests covering encrypt/decrypt roundtrip, short-token rejection, auth code roundtrip, expiry, client reg roundtrip, and wrong-type rejection; all pass.

userStories.title: Test filter transformation logic
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests confirming that the filters array is correctly transformed into the backend body object format used in list_logs and list_traces.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/filters.test.ts
Extract the filter transformation loop into a shared helper function (e.g. lib/shared/filters.ts: export function buildFilterBody(filters)) so it is independently testable
Update list_logs and list_traces to call this helper instead of inlining the loop
Test: empty array produces empty object {}
Test: single filter {field: 'error_count', operator: 'gt', value: [0]} produces {error_count: {value: [0], operator: 'gt'}}
Test: multiple filters all appear as separate keys in the output
Test: filter with empty string operator produces operator: '' in the output
Tests pass (npm test)
Typecheck passes (npm run build)
userStories.notes: lib/shared/filters.ts created with buildFilterBody; logs.ts and traces.ts updated to use helper; tests/filters.test.ts has 4 tests; all 18 tests pass; build passes.
